summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOTO PAM online gaming platform. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified LOTO PAM public pages (homepage, login, register, play, results) and Super Admin LOTO PAM module pages (dashboard, players, deposits). Fixed 4 backend bugs with log_activity() parameter and MongoDB ObjectId serialization.

issues: Minor hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - cosmetic React warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed 4 calls to log_activity() in online_routes.py - was using 'details' instead of 'metadata' parameter
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in get_online_settings() - added settings.pop('_id', None) after insert
All LOTO PAM public routes working correctly (/lotopam, /lotopam/login, /lotopam/register, /lotopam/play, /lotopam/results)
Super Admin LOTO PAM Online module fully functional (/super/online/dashboard, /super/online/players, /super/online/deposits)
Sidebar correctly shows LOTO PAM Online section with all menu items
seed_data_creation: Created test players during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: LOTO PAM online platform is fully functional. Backend APIs are working (registration, login, wallet, games, results, admin endpoints). Frontend pages load correctly with proper routing. Super Admin can view online players (currently 2 test players), pending deposits (0), pending withdrawals (0), and KYC submissions. Keno and Raffle games are marked as 'BIENTÔT' (coming soon).

loto_pam_public_portal.homepage: PASS - /lotopam loads with game cards, results, CTAs
loto_pam_public_portal.register_page: PASS - /lotopam/register shows full registration form with all fields
loto_pam_public_portal.play_page: PASS - /lotopam/play shows Lottery, Keno (coming soon), Raffle (coming soon)
loto_pam_public_portal.results_page: PASS - /lotopam/results displays lottery results with search and date filter

super_admin_loto_pam_module.online_dashboard: PASS - /super/online/dashboard shows stats (players, KYC, deposits, withdrawals, tickets)
super_admin_loto_pam_module.players_management: PASS - /super/online/players lists players with search/filter, player detail panel
super_admin_loto_pam_module.deposits_management: PASS - /super/online/deposits shows pending deposits with approve/reject actions
super_admin_loto_pam_module.sidebar_integration: PASS - LOTO PAM Online section visible in sidebar with all menu items

log_activity_parameter_error.description: TypeError: log_activity() got an unexpected keyword argument 'details'
log_activity_parameter_error.cause: online_routes.py was calling log_activity() with 'details=' instead of 'metadata='
log_activity_parameter_error.fix: Changed 4 occurrences from 'details=' to 'metadata=' in online_routes.py

mongodb_objectid_serialization.description: ValueError: ObjectId object is not iterable when getting admin settings
mongodb_objectid_serialization.cause: When inserting new settings document, MongoDB adds _id but it wasn't being excluded from response
mongodb_objectid_serialization.fix: Added settings.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() in get_online_settings()
